login.title: User Login
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

callback.title: Authenticating...
callback.description: Please wait while we complete your authentication.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgotPassword.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.requestError: An error occurred while sending reset link

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully.
resetPassword.requestError: An error occurred while resetting password

register.title: User Registration
register.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
register.usernameMax: Username must be at most 20 characters
register.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers and underscores
register.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.successDescription: Your account has been created successfully! Redirecting to login page in {{count}} seconds

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeMessage: You have successfully logged in. Here you can manage your personal information, view system status, and perform other operations.

totp.title: Two-Factor Authentication
totp.description: Enhance your account security with TOTP
totp.scanQR: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
totp.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app:
